chats.message: ‎Pesan dan panggilan terenkripsi secara end-to-end. Hanya orang di chat ini yang bisa membaca, mendengarkan, atau membagikannya.

Intok benekke blocke aku siang pagi sore rak mainan wes
Benekke robloxe, aku kepencet hapus, ISO benekke Ra?

Iya nang, apik2 ya neng mbah tin,
Ya asyiq pas tak loginke malah dihapus meneh o
Iki raiso install seng nggone asyiq?
Asyiq gelem tapi aku rak gelem benekke

Kan install meneh dadi pengaturane balik 4 jam nang
Wes ora waktu entek to ( setel )
Nang, batas aplikasi roblox 5 jam hari ini, mending dinggo nanti malem wae

Balik tgl 11 nang, iseh suwi nang

Lah kamu sampe jam 1 bengi kok
Nek wes ngerti wayah turu diblock yo leren

Terima kasih telah menghubungi The Twenty Seven Hotel By Rainbow's House Semarang. Silahkan Reservasi dengan format "Nama Pemesan dan Tanggal Check In" lalu kirim!

Kamu lagi apa?
Makasih udah baca WA aku ☺️

Hotel yg bisa dipesan *CUMA* dgn kirim pesan & langsung kami siapkan kamarnya.

*RESERVASI* dulu buat dapet *DISKON*, harga dijamin *TERENDAH*, simple dan bisa *BAYAR DITEMPAT*, _gausah transfer untuk menghindari penipuan_

Kami juga menyediakan *RISEN Sky Lounge & Resto* di lantai paling atas untuk nongkrong, bermalaman dgn teman & pasangan sampe tengah malem.

_"*Pesan kamar dulu via WhatsApp* dan datang kapanpun yg kamu mau!"_


*The 27 by Rainbows House*
Jl. Medoho Raya 1 No. 27 Gayamsari Semarang.
_(Sebelah Pandawa)_

Sub FINAL_Import_Sort_KW_To_Sheet_Sorted()

Dim fd As FileDialog
Dim filePath As String
Dim wbSrc As Workbook
Dim wsSrc As Worksheet
Dim wsTarget As Worksheet
Dim sheetName As String
Dim lastRow As Long
Dim c As Long
Dim sh As Worksheet
Dim found As Boolean

' =========================
' CEK / BUAT SHEET "shorted"
' =========================
found = False
For Each sh In ThisWorkbook.Worksheets
If LCase(sh.Name) = "shorted" Then
Set wsTarget = sh
found = True
Exit For
End If
Next sh

If Not found Then
Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add( _
After:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Count))
wsTarget.Name = "shorted"
Else
wsTarget.Cells.Clear
End If

' =========================
' PILIH FILE SUMBER
' =========================
Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
With fd
.Title = "Pilih File Sumber Reservasi"
.Filters.Clear
.Filters.Add "Excel Files", "*.xls; *.xlsx; *.xlsm"
.AllowMultiSelect = False
If .Show <> -1 Then Exit Sub
filePath = .SelectedItems(1)
End With

Application.ScreenUpdating = False
Application.EnableEvents = False

' =========================
' BUKA FILE READ ONLY
' =========================
Set wbSrc = Workbooks.Open(filePath, ReadOnly:=True)

' =========================
' PILIH SHEET SUMBER
' =========================
sheetName = Application.InputBox( _
"Masukkan NAMA SHEET sumber:", _
"Pilih Sheet", Type:=2)

If sheetName = "" Then GoTo TutupSumber

On Error Resume Next
Set wsSrc = wbSrc.Worksheets(sheetName)
On Error GoTo 0

If wsSrc Is Nothing Then
MsgBox "Sheet sumber tidak ditemukan", vbCritical
GoTo TutupSumber
End If

' =========================
' COPY FULL FORMAT A–P
' =========================
lastRow = wsSrc.Cells(wsSrc.Rows.Count, "A").End(xlUp).Row

wsSrc.Range("A5:P" & lastRow).Copy
wsTarget.Range("A1").PasteSpecial xlPasteAll

' =========================
' SAMAKAN LEBAR KOLOM
' =========================
For c = 1 To 16
wsTarget.Columns(c).ColumnWidth = wsSrc.Columns(c).ColumnWidth
Next c

Application.CutCopyMode = False

' =========================
' SORT BERDASARKAN KW (E)
' =========================
lastRow = wsTarget.Cells(wsTarget.Rows.Count, "A").End(xlUp).Row

With wsTarget.Sort
.SortFields.Clear
.SortFields.Add Key:=wsTarget.Range("E2:E" & lastRow), _
SortOn:=xlSortOnValues, Order:=xlAscending
.SetRange wsTarget.Range("A1:P" & lastRow)
.Header = xlYes
.Apply
End With

TutupSumber:
wbSrc.Close SaveChanges:=False

Application.ScreenUpdating = True
Application.EnableEvents = True

MsgBox "Data berhasil di-import & diurutkan ke sheet 'shorted'", vbInformation

End Sub
